name: Security Misconfiguration
what_it_means: Unsafe defaults or forgotten hardening (open CORS, verbose errors, unused methods, missing headers, hardcoded secrets).
animated_example: Leaving windows open after installing a new security door.
quick_checks: Disable unused HTTP methods (TRACE, PUT/DELETE if unused)
Secrets managed in vault; not in code/images/env files
how_to_test: Preflight CORS probes; attempt cross-origin reads
Trigger errors and inspect for stack traces/paths
Probe OPTIONS/TRACE; scan for header gaps and configs
expected_outcomes: Minimal information exposure; tight method/origin controls
No secrets or environment details leaked
minimal_example: Wildcard CORS + verbose SQL error → misconfiguration; fix to strict origin + generic error
